biography: Pierre Perifel (born March 19, 1980) is a French filmmaker and animator, best known for his work at DreamWorks Animation. He is the director of the feature film The Bad Guys and the award-winning short films Bilby and Le Building. He is an alumnus of École Émile-Cohl and Gobelins, l'Ecole de l'image.
name: Pierre Perifel
